body_txt: A Selfie Fiend is a character who is always taking photos of themself . They're usually female and usually a teenager or 20-something. Even at inappropriate times, they'll want to snap a pic. Selfie Fiends often have a narcissistic interest in themselves. They also tend to be fashion oriented . Selfies have existed for decades, but they really caught on in the late 2000s and especially the 2010s when social media became popular and smartphones became more common. As a result, this is a newer trope. This trope is an evolution of Phoneaholic Teenager and often overlaps with it. The difference is that Selfie Fiends spend a lot of time on their phones taking pictures, while Phoneaholic Teenagers usually just use their cell phones to talk or text. Related to Camera Fiend , which is about taking pictures of others . If their inappropriate selfie timing endangers their own lives (or others), that's Social Media Before Reason .
